column2: Loss is marked even after I have shared QC images
column3: QC failure
column4:
Step 1: Identify the loss marked AWB* When the Captain raises a request stating that the FE has been marked with a wrong loss, the agent needs to first enter the **FE ID or Phone Number** in query:https://metabase-main.bi.meeshogcp.in/question/187207-qc-fail* Apply the **exact time range** when the loss was marked.* The Captain will share the **loss marked amount**.* The agent needs to locate the same amount on the mentioned date and identify the **AWB number** against which the loss was marked.
Step 2: Check the debit reason* Enter the identified **AWB number** in query:https://metabase-main.bi.meeshogcp.in/question/187207-qc-fail* Check the **debit_reason** column.* The possible debit reasons are:* LM Secondary QC junk image* Pickup junk image* ICUD junk image* Pickup vs QC image mismatch.
Step 3: Identify the node where loss was marked* If the debit reason is **LM Secondary QC junk image** → Loss is marked on the **LM Hub**.* If the debit reason is **Pickup junk image** → Loss is marked on the **LM FE (Pickup FE)**.* If the debit reason is **ICUD junk image** → Loss is marked on the **LM FE (ICUD FE - Forward leg)**.* If the debit reason is **Pickup vs QC image mismatch** → Loss is marked on the **LM FE**.
Step 4: Validate images and take action* The agent needs to review the images captured at the respective node where the loss was marked.* Check whether the entity has followed the required SOP.* If the entity has followed the SOP → The marked loss will be reversed.* If the entity has not followed the SOP → The loss will be considered valid and the entity will bear the loss.
column6: Direct L2 escaltion if a image mismatch is ientified by L1 agent
column7:
1. L2 agent must review the ticket and the loss marked.
2. If the loss is correctly marked then response to captain
3. If the loss is rightly contested then L2 agent must raise it for reversal on the dashboard made by the SX team.
4. SX team is to check the loss and confirm the re-attribution within 48 hours.

column2: Tech issues
column3:
Unable to scan,
Unable to close DRS/BTS,
Unable to mark shipment as delivered,
Unable to click/upload pictures,
App is hanging or freezing,
Login issues,
Any other Log10
column4:
Whenever a captain raises a technical issue, the agent must first verify the exact nature of the problem and confirm whether it is related to Log10.

If the issue is related to Log10, the agent should route the case to the Log10 Team using the template provided below:
"Dear Partner, this is a technical issue. Please raise a ticket with the Ops Tech team by emailing log10-tech-support@valmo.in.and include relevant supporting proof for assistance.

For any other support,Please  feel free to reach out to us.
